description: Cross-cutting observability gate. Every scheduled UC skill must satisfy this contract before marking status: done.

health_check.description: Periodic check that the pipeline is alive and producing expected output.

alert_channel.description: Where the learner gets notified when something breaks.

retry_policy.description: How the pipeline handles transient failures. Always bounded.

enforcement_description: Scheduled UC skill cannot transition to status: done if any required field is missing from arch_blocks.<name>.observability. Warn at partial, block at done.
